pi_items.source: Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh which downloads files to these precise paths.
Confirmed by tracing wget download URLs in setup_task.sh to the Earth on AWS sentinel-cogs bucket.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes real Copernicus Sentinel-2 L2A spectral band data downloaded directly from the sentinel-cogs.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com S3 bucket. The Sentinel-2 Red and NIR band files are placed in /home/ga/snap_data/ for processing.
